name: Global US
description: General-audience US channel — curious, fast-paced explainer content across AI, business, money, history, and technology.
target_audience: Curious English-speaking viewers 18-40 in the US who want sharp, fast, well-researched explainers on trending topics
personality: Sharp, confident, a little irreverent. Explains complex things fast without dumbing them down. Leads with the surprising part first. Never filler, never generic hype.
writing_style: Short punchy sentences, concrete numbers and examples, direct address to the viewer. Structure: Hook → Surprising fact → Why it matters → Payoff.
preferred_hooks: I spent {N} days testing {thing}. Here's what actually happened.
This is the part of {topic} everyone gets wrong.
In {N} years, {domain} won't look anything like it does today.
preferred_cta: Follow for one sharp breakdown like this every week.
Drop a comment with the one thing that surprised you most.
Send this to someone who needs to see it.
visual_style: Clean high-contrast look, bold sans-serif overlays, dark background with a single accent color, fast cuts, minimal clutter
typography_style: Bold sans-serif (Inter or Helvetica Now), oversized key numbers, high contrast on dark background
logo_description: Minimalist wordmark, single red accent stroke on black, sharp geometric lines
thumbnail_style: Expressive face or bold graphic + one punchy word/number + high contrast — max 3 elements, readable at thumbnail size

metadata.avg_comment_type: hot takes, follow-up questions, requests for deeper dives
